channel.title: intro on Andy
channel.description: Recent content in intro on Andy

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hello. I’m Andy. I graduated from NUS with a Bachelor’s degree in computer science. I’m currently working as a software engineer in GovTech. I started this blog as a way to keep track of my journey as an engineer, and also to write about other topics of interest, if any. You can find out more about me here on my Linkedin!
